name: Cocoa Fudge Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 2/3 cups all-purpose flour or 2 cups cake flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour a rectangular pan, 13 x 9 x 2 inches.
3. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients on low speed for 30 seconds, scraping the sides of the bowl constantly.
4. Increase the speed to high and beat for an additional 3 minutes, scraping the bowl occasionally.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. The cake is delicious without frosting, but you can frost it if desired.
